title: CUB Banking Redesign
subtitle: Elevating Indian Mobile Banking Experience for Next-Gen Users
problem_statement: CUB's app is functional but lacks proactive, personalized financial guidance for India's digital-first users.

pillars.title: Financial Control
pillars.insight: Users desire clear, actionable insights for better money management.

pillars.title: Digital Security
pillars.insight: Trust in secure, transparent online financial transactions is paramount.

pillars.title: Seamless Efficiency
pillars.insight: Busy users demand quick, intuitive banking operations.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we personalize CUB's banking experience?
How might users gain proactive financial control?
How might we integrate AI for smarter money management?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools for my growing investments.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy, busy professional, seeks efficient investment and savings management.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Budgeting is hard; help me track expenses.
personas.bio: Young professional, manages daily expenses, aims to save for future goals.

insights: I wish I had better control.

points.action: Replace generic banners with personalized financial nudges.
Integrate budgeting tools with transaction history.
Adopt AI-driven insights for spending patterns.
Enhance 'Daily Expense' with detailed category breakdown.

pivot.before: Generic banking app, reactive to user commands, lacks proactive financial guidance.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from transactional utility to intelligent financial partnership, leveraging data for personalized insights and predictive advice.
pivot.after: Intuitive, personalized financial hub, empowering users with smart money management.

annotations.title: Smart Dashboard
annotations.rationale: Replaces generic account card with personalized financial summary.

annotations.title: Action Hub
annotations.rationale: Consolidates "Instant Fund Transfer" and "Bill Pay" for quick access.

annotations.title: Insight Cards
annotations.rationale: Replaces promotional banners with contextual, actionable financial advice.

data.finding: Promotional banners compete with core banking features.
Bottom CUB logo redundant with top branding.
Pay button greyed out is good visual feedback.
A+ icon suggests some customization options.
